sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23687" key="dei/lomai2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δείλομαι</orth> (B), Delph. and <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dialect" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Locr.</gram></gramGrp>, <sense id="n23687.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βούλομαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
